creator: gperciva@tarsnap.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)
> ^Triage: the [PATCH] convention is no longer necessary, given that we can flag
attachments as 'patch'.

Thanks for the clarification!

Should we amend https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributing/ ?  It states that we should use [PATCH] in sections 2.1 and 2.3.
